name: AnTix Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Item 1. Description of Business Corporate Background AnTix Holdings, Inc. (formerly known as Innovative MedTech, Inc.), (the Company) was originally formed on April 21, 2005, in New Jersey as Serino 1, Corp. On March 25, 2021, the Company acquired two companies, Sarah Adult Day Services, Inc., and Sarah Day Care Centers, Inc. (collectively SarahCare), an adult day care center franchisor and provider. With multiple locations in 13 states, SarahCare offered seniors daytime care and activiti...
